title: HexaBiome AuraFlare
description: Biome Texture Pack that change the Biome colors into 6 extraordinary colors that make Minecraft Celestial World
body:
HexaBiome-AuraFlare texture pack.
It's a simple biome texture pack that help to provide 6 exceptional colors variation.
after applying this texture pack you get an Celestial Minecraft world.
there are 6 extraordinary colors grass and trees.
gives you an Ethereal experience.
colors are Crimson-Red, Cherry-Blossom-Pink , Coral , Amber-Gold , Electric-Lime and Dark-Turquoise

this pack is compatible with various shaders, with great potential.
it's based of Minecraft simple and colored graphics.

all high pixel texture pack supported 16,32,64,128,256,512,1024,2k pixel all.


THERE ARE MANY CHANGES IN THE GRAPHICS
CHANGES ARE -
1)Grass
2)Leaves
3)Colormap
4)Environment
5)GUI title
6)Sugarcane

{Best Combination For Best Graphics}
Texture Pack
-Coven and Round Tree
Shaders
-Bliss [DH support]
-Bsl



version supported
form- 1.16 to latest

compatible with both single world and servers.

make sure you check the file version before downloading the pack
all versions have separate files



enjoy the pack
make your Minecraft.

THANKS FOR DOWNLOADIND
